content: اِلوَرشَة هَيِبقى مَعَاد هَخَمسَة إِلّا رُبَّع يَوْم اَلخَميس
translations: eng:the workshop will be thursday at a quarter to five

transcriptions.arabizi: ilwarsha hayib'a mAad|ha chamsa 'ila rubbaA yoom ilchamees
